children.heading: Agreements in response to countervailable subsidies
children.label: a Agreements in response to countervailable subsidies

children.text: eliminating the countervailable subsidy completely, or
reducing the net countervailable subsidy to a level that eliminates completely the injurious effect of exports to the United States of the merchandise.

children.heading: Modification of agreements on basis of consultations
children.label: b Modification of agreements on basis of consultations
children.text: At the direction of the President, the administering authority shall modify a quantitative restriction agreement as a result of consultations entered into under subsection (a).

children.heading: Special rule regarding agreements undersection 1671c(c)(3) of this title
children.label: c Special rule regarding agreements undersection 1671c(c)(3) of this title
children.text: This subpart shall cease to apply to a quantitative restriction agreement described in at such time as that agreement ceases to have force and effect under or violation is found under .section 1671c(c)(3) of this titlesection 1671c(f) of this titlesection 1671c(i) of this title
